name: Cleopatra
text: Charisma contest: recruit target unit to your side for 1 turn.
flavor: The last pharaoh played Rome like a harp.

name: Nikola Tesla
text: Draw an item from your main deck.
flavor: The man who lit the world — then vanished from it.

name: Miyamoto Musashi
text: Strength contest: injure target unit at same location.

name: Ada Lovelace
text: Look at the top 3 cards of your main deck. Keep one.
flavor: The first programmer — before the first computer.

name: Genghis Khan
text: Take control of target location for 2 turns.
flavor: He did not build. He took.
